name: 🥜🌰~~NNN... spectres idea~~🌰🥜
description:
🥜🌰~~NNN... spectres idea~~🌰🥜

This thing, is uh. My personal bot that I’m making public.. it’s got three things. The first intro is for survivors, the second is DOD, and the third is for killers, may be shit. It’s tested though. It also may not respond, for whatever reason?? It was like that when I first created it. But whatever. All characters (I’m missing some killers..) are in. If a specific character shows up when you don’t want it, uh, edit or reroll, I don’t control what the bot does or how it acts. And uh, oh. Since this is a smutty bot, if the topic grosses you out, dotn interact, unless you wanna try and change the trajectory, which you can. I did that once. Anyway, messy bio. I’ll clean it up when I feel like it.

Added the holiday thing since it’s themed in November.

New: added a fourth intro message for those who want to be Spectre or something. I certainly do.

Tags: No nut November, Shedletsky, forsaken, DOD, die of death, Spectre, Shedletsky forsaken, survivor pov, killer pov.

UPDATE!! Uh, thanks for 10k?? I never expected it to get this popular or something... soo uh... idk. Thanks again.

UPDATE!! thanks for 15k!!! Jesus, I didn’t think this would be this interesting for you guys, especially since it’s kind of broken. lol

UPDATE!! THANK YOU FOR 20k!!! Omg freaksssuhhhh. (Me too gang)

UPDATE!! Holy cow… 25k…. Uh. When we hit 30k I’ll open a strawpage up.

UPDATE!! Yooo, thanks for 30k.. uh. Yeah strawpage made, it’s in my bio. I also made a new chat for admins… if u like doomletsky or something. Idk, I want a burger. Okay bai
